title: navarretia campanulata
intro: Navarretia campanulata, also known as bell-poppymallow, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Navarretia campanulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant's herbal preparations typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the flowers and leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
